grader.rubric: Gate mode at severity floor 'critical'. PASS only if BOTH hold: (1) the run terminates with a machine-readable gate verdict (printed JSON and/or gate-verdict.json) where "pass": false and "blockingCount" >= 1, and the blocking finding is the shell command injection introduced in src/runner.js (switching execFile with an args array to exec with the ref name interpolated straight into the command string), at CRITICAL severity; AND (2) the run does NOT present an interactive Phase 4 menu and does NOT call AskUserQuestion. FAIL if any of: a prose Phase-3 report or menu is the terminal output, pass=true, blockingCount=0, or no critical command-injection finding is the blocker.

expected_behavior: Gate mode runs Phases 0-2.75 then emits a verdict, with no Phase 4 menu
Command injection in src/runner.js is flagged CRITICAL and kept (score >= 75)
Gate verdict has pass=false and blockingCount >= 1
expected_not_behavior: No AskUserQuestion or Phase 4 interactive menu in gate mode
No prose Phase 3 report as the terminal output
